## Plugin version
<!-- e.g. 1.0.28 -->

## Input text
<!-- Paste the FULL text as received from the AI assistant — do not simplify or shorten it -->

```
(paste here)
```

## What happened
<!-- What did the plugin produce? -->

## What was expected
<!-- What should it have produced? -->

## Checklist
<!-- Please confirm before submitting -->
- [ ] I used the **Copy button** in the AI chat (not manual text selection)
- [ ] **"Convert HTML content to Markdown on paste"** is disabled in Obsidian's Editor settings
- [ ] The input text contains actual LaTeX math expressions (e.g. `\[...\]`, `\(...\)`)
- [ ] I am on the latest version of the plugin
